series_metadata.series_description: All records pertaining to the duties of the State Approving Agency ("SAA") section of the Department. This includes but is not limited to, voyager reports, travel expenses, quarterly reports, and school catalogs. This schedule implements the contractual requirement of the cooperative agreement between DVS and the United States Department of Veterans Affairs. The retention period also allows sufficient time for audits and other reviews balanced against reducing long term storage costs for records with limited administrative value beyond the retention period.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain seven (7) years then destroy., Paper: Shred
